name: Stuffed Baked Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Wash and dry the potatoes, then pierce several times with a fork.
3. Place on an oven-safe rack and bake for 45 to 60 minutes, or until very soft.
4. Remove from the oven; preheat the broiler.
5. Let potatoes cool slightly, then cut a wedge equal to one-third of the potato from the top of each.
6. Carefully remove enough of the interior to leave about half an inch of potato inside the skin.
7. Mash in a bowl with yogurt, blue cheese, and green onions.
8. Spoon the mixture back into the potato shells, mounding over the top.
9. Sprinkle each with paprika.
10. Broil for 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
You can add chopped cooked vegetables to the yogurt/cheese to make a more filling dish.
